title: John Bateman-Champain
extract: John Norman Bateman-Champain (14 March 1880 – 22 October 1950) was a British Anglican bishop who served as Bishop of Knaresborough, the suffragan bishop of the Church of England Diocese of Ripon. He had previously been a first-class English cricketer, making five appearances (two for Gloucestershire: and three for the Free Foresters); he was a right-handed batsman.
